      About this item

      • Stereo sound headphones: KVIDIO bluetooth headphones with dual 40mm drivers, offers an almost concert hall-like feel to your favorite music as close as you're watching it live. Provide low latency high-quality reproduction of sound for listeners, audiophiles, and home audio enthusiasts
      • Unmatched comfortable headphones: Over ear earmuff made by softest memory-protein foam gives you all day comfort. Adjustable headband and flexible earmuffs can easily fit any head shape without putting pressure on the ear. Foldable and ONLY 0.44lbs Lightweight design makes it the best choice for Travel, Workout and Every day use by College Students
      • Wide compatibility: Simply press multi-function button 2s and the over ear headphones with mic will be in ready to pair. KVIDIO wireless headsets are compatible with all devices that support Bluetooth or 3.5 mm plug cables. With the built-in microphone, you can easily make hands-free calls or facetime meetings while working at home
      • Seamless wireless connection: Bluetooth version V5.4 ensures an ultra fast and virtually unbreakable connection up to 33 feet (10 meters). Rechargeable 500mAh battery can be quick charged within 2.5 hours. After 65 hours of playtime, you can switch KVIDIO Cordless Headset from wireless to wired mode and enjoy your music NON-STOP. No worry for power shortage problem during long trip
      • Package: Package include a Foldable Deep Bass Headphone, 3.5mm backup audio cable, USB charging cable and User Manual.

        Global Recycled Standard

        Global Recycled Standard (GRS) certified products contain recycled content that has been independently verified at each stage of the supply chain, from the source to the final product and meet social, environmental, and chemical requirements. The purchase of Global Recycled Standard (GRS) certified products supports the use of recycled content in the supply chain. A product must contain at least 50% certified GRS material to qualify for inclusion in Climate Pledge Friendly.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Review this product

      Share your thoughts with other customers
      Write a customer review

      Customers say

      Customers find these headphones offer good sound quality and value for money, with one customer noting they're better than Beats headphones. They are comfortable, don't hurt the ears, and have excellent battery life that doesn't take long to charge. Moreover, they connect easily via Bluetooth and can connect to two devices simultaneously. However, the noise cancellation feature receives mixed reviews, with some praising its effectiveness while others note it's not completely effective.
      AI Generated from the text of customer reviews Generated from the text of customer reviews

      Customers like the sound quality of these headphones.
      "Comfort and quality — great set of headphones, long-playing and great sound! Love these!! Love that they are wireless. Bought several for gifting." Read more

      "...best at noise cancellation (compared to Bose, for example), but a great value and decent sound quality for Zoom calls, music streaming, and phone..." Read more
      "I like these, good price, easy to figure out, good quality. Cons: I can't set the volume low enough without turning the sound completely off." Read more
      "easy to use, good for the price, great battery life, it’s okay at noise cancellation but your music will leak out of the headphones a bit if it’s..." Read more

      "These are great headphones. They have great sound and are comfortable. I bought the first pair last year, and just bought these as a second pair...." Read more
      "I love my kvidio wireless headphones. It is great product. The battery last a long time and the sound clear. Easy to pair it to your device...." Read more
      "I have used them for more than a month now and they are of good quality, they can be heard perfectly and the battery lasts approximately 4 days..." Read more
      "We purchased two sets for our boys and so far they are of great quality and we havent had to charge them as of yet so I highly recommend for those..." Read more

      Customers are satisfied with the headphones' battery life, noting that it is insanely good and doesn't take long to charge.
      "...They are comfortable to wear for several hours a day. Long battery life which lasts me for several days. Great sound quality including low bass...." Read more
      "This product fits comfortably, has good sound quality and a great battery life. Connected flawlessly and I have had no issues. Definitely recommend" Read more
      "...am very pleased with these headphones, comfort, range, ease of use, battery life and sound quality are about what I expect at this price point...." Read more
      "...sturdy headphones, comfortable to wear doesn't press on ears, good battery life and long distance connection Bluetooth, comes with USB charge cable..." Read more
      955 customers mention functionality, 751 positive, 204 negative955 customers mention "Functionality"751 positive204 negative
      Customers find that the headphones work well and are reliable, with one customer specifically mentioning they work great for podcasts.
      "...I also have a pair, and it works great. sound quality is nice, it is a bit tight on my ears, but my daughter does not have that issue...." Read more
      "Got for my mother in nursing home with roommate and work great when they are watching different shows on their TV's or as to not disturb if roommate..." Read more
      "...these so i dont disturb my wife on the living room tv , so far works well, im hard of hearing so it is difficult to have volume up on tv when wife..." Read more
      "...I bought them in January and it is now March and they stopped working. Even when I try to plug them into charge the light doesn’t pop up...." Read more

      "...my kid a pair for Christmas and she hasn’t taken them off they are comfortable, loud, long lasting and I couldn’t recommend them enough honestly 10/10" Read more
      "for the price. Very comfortable and surprisingly good sound. A friend was over when I got these and after trying them out immediately ordered a pair...." Read more
      "Product works great! Has good sound, comfortable to wear, recognizes connection immediately even on multiple devices and has super long battery life!..." Read more

      Customers appreciate the headphones' connectivity, as they pair easily with phones and can connect to two devices simultaneously.

      "...I like that they are not noise canceling so I feel safe and not isolated. I bought them specifically to use on the airplane and they worked perfectly!" Read more
      "...These headphones do the job well. They're not noise cancelling, but they do muffle a lot of outside sounds just by enveloping the ear area entirely,..." Read more
      "The headphones produce excellent sound and noise cancellation. They are very uncomfortable to wear and difficult to adjust the sound or turn on/off...." Read more

      Amazon Customer
      5 out of 5 stars
      Buy!!!! In multiples and give as gifts or have one in multiple locations
      The quick: Yes buy! great value for the battery life and comfort and flexibility and foldable portability. Cons. Not really a con for me but if you are looking for noise canceling feature than this isnʻt it even thou it does a half decent job just from being an over the ear comfortable option. Wow wow wow iʻm every day using these and with great joy even thou they do not have specifically any ʻnoisecancelʻ type of feature iʻm still able ro benefit an overall less intense experience from surrounding noiselevels which is what i was looking for. If you really need total silence than these arent it. I can still hear the dulled humm of the refrigerator while wearing these. I can still hear my soʻs phone converstions in the other room for the most part while wearing these. I can still hear the breathing slightly snorring of someone in bed Iʻm sitting next to but it is muffled and softened. I can still somewhat hear the wood floor creaking under my own feet while wearing these but the effect is much much less unnerving more importantlyvto note, And this is without turning it on and without having music being played. The over the ear piece does a decent job of half-way dampening the intensity of a busy thirty people sevenhundredish square feet industrial room. Love that the oval design covers my ears all around as that was a critical feature I desired andxhose these after I searched high and low through amazon to find a model that specifically had an OVAL design and this one does! Because it helps ro fully enclose the ears to have a better affect of dampening incoming ambient sounds. Love the battery life is excellent lasts almost two days left on constantly sonce I forget to turn off and fall asleep comfortably using it all night to drown out mdh cpap snorrings. It does a great kob to connect and disconnect and swap from calls to videos to spotify! There have been a few times when it was even anle to overlay spotify background with instagram voice but thats a unreliable fluke experience. Buy buy buy!!! Love this thing!!! Great option for the price. I took some nail polish to the seafom grean colored one and customized it. I love that it colapses and rotates and folds. It is made for right handed use tho and the long press for volume controls are the same buttons that when single pressrd advance skipnext or repeat songs.. there are only three buttons so its not confising at all to use and they have good click tactility. It has lights to indicate on (blue slow flashing) and turning off/charging (red) and no lights when turned off. It helps keep me more calm in busy environments as the wear is comfortable and has a non sticky soft feel. I prefer using over the ear options as my neurodivergent ears canʻt tolerate inserted options easily. When wearing these the ambient sounds are slightly dulled out so it is decent enough to listen to music and still enjoy a conversation if you wish or pretend that you canʻt hear anyone if you wish haha! .. but dulled just enough that I can still more or less unless they are speaking really softly ..understand close five feet conversation and not be too overwhelmed by my sound sensitivities. If you are looking for an economicallly sound option of over the ear portable lightweight collapsible foldable good batterylife without the noisecancelling shennanigans this one is it without regrets. I found a way to use a watch dial to make the volume that much softer than the regular on device or phone button volume control is capable of maneuvering if you start out with a medium volume level to begin you can get just a few more not hes of less volume. The device is capable of going pretty loud but struggles to go really soft for someone typical this probably isnʻt any issue to fret over but for someone with extreemely high sensitivity to sound this takes noting not yo expect supervsift sound capability without going the extra mile to dial down every sound monitoring option in settings of both device and in the player of originating sounds. The rotation of the over the ear piece only goes one 90 degree way and not 180 to the opposite way. That is a piece of information not readily accessible unless you are trying it out. Depending on how far out you extend the over the head piece, it can make it more or less snug over your ears while balancing on and possibly compromising on height of wearing the over the head area of the over the head and ears phones. I mean that if you put the phone on without extending out the length of the top it can feel looser on the part of the ears but if you extend then it can create more pressure on the ears.. basically if you have a very tall head and your head is also wide then it might feel a bit tighter which could translate to better sound muffling from the snug tight fit of the earphones but if you have a short head that is wide it might not feel as snug based on how you extend or unextend the headpiece. These are Neurodivergent details here, not for the feint of neurotypical i could carelessJargon about tightness of fit. I wasnt spevifically looking for a noisecancelling feature and iʻm very happy with the ability of these non noisecanceling overthe ear headphones to dampen just enough to still have conversation but not annihilate ambient sounds! If uou generally are facing someone who tends to speak too loudly for your comfort then you will love having these on while conversating. I found the accent of the person who speaks to announce ʻ powher ongg connectedʻ vs pohwehrg ogfʻʻ when pushing hold down center button to turn on/off the device, a bit interesting as a french american english speaker. My take overall? Heck yeah go for it. This would make a great gift!!! Over the ear deaigns that actually are oval and are able to cover your entire ear are much more possible of ability to dampen ambient sounds and to feel more comfortable and not cause pressure on ear cartilage. I wish more models and higher end brands of popularity would realize and incorporate this oval over the war headphone/earphone feature into their designs!!!!!!!

      • Wendy Ferrie
        5.0 out of 5 stars Pure Bliss for Your Ears!
        Reviewed in the United States on February 19, 2026
        Color: PinkVerified Purchase
        I am absolutely blown away by these KVIDIO headphones and honestly cannot believe the quality for the price. The first thing I noticed was the comfort; the memory foam ear cups are incredibly soft and I can wear them for hours during work or travel without any of that annoying pressure on my ears. The sound quality is remarkably crisp with deep, punchy bass that makes my music feel immersive, and the Bluetooth connection is rock solid with no lag. Perhaps the most impressive feature is the battery life, which seems to last forever on a single charge. They are lightweight, fold up easily for my bag, and look much more expensive than they actually are. If you are looking for a reliable, high-performing pair of headphones without breaking the bank, these are an absolute home run.

      • Joe Dininni
        5.0 out of 5 stars Excellent budget headphones that punch above their weight class
        Reviewed in the United States on October 15, 2023
        Color: PinkVerified Purchase
        These sound excellent for the price. Not "audiophile grade", but that's nowhere near expected for $30. The value is ridiculous. Comfortable, lightweight, fits well without falling off or exerting painful pressure on the head over prolonged use. Battery life is VERY impressive, though I tend to listen at low to moderate volumes, which of course will extend the time between charges. The soft materials feel great, though I can't speak for longtime longevity of the pad covering for example, since I haven't had them for years.

        Overall, the sound profile is way more balanced than I would expect from a budget headphone. It genuinely sounds fairly accurate with surprising clarity. No frequency range feels too recessed, nor is it too in-your-face. Keep in mind, these aren't crystal clear, silky smooth, or perfectly even across the full frequency range, but those are characteristics reserved for a WAY higher price point and are completely unexpected here.

        - Bass reproduction is imperfect, not totally even, has some undesirable resonance in lower frequencies that can muddy the experience, but it's less of an issue than I'd expect at this price point. It's not way too overtuned, but it's also not anemic or lacking. Also, repositioning these on the head slightly can help with the muddiness. I'm pretty sure there's not a $30 headphone under the sun that actually has great bass reproduction, so definitely not knocking a star off for this. Worlds better than a lot of bass-boosted consumer headphones, without falling into the insipid tin can category.

        - Mids are pleasant and generally sit in the right spot in the mix. If you don't crank them up, they're not too harsh or "serrated-edged", but not buttery smooth either. More than acceptable, but can sound a little shouty at times. They will get harsher at louder volumes.

        - Highs aren't crystal clear, but don't feel too lacking or unnaturally excited. They won't present perfectly in a busy mix, but once again, nothing will at such a price. It's impressive how they're always serviceable, never totally getting lost or garbled while also not being painfully piercing.

        - Soundstage is just okay, but absolutely good enough for a super-affordable closed-back headphone. Like everything else, it's better at a moderate volume where things feel less compressed in general.

        They get really loud (too loud) from a regular source like a phone, whether over Bluetooth or a wired connection. The best sound quality will definitely come at a moderate volume though, since the drivers don't begin to present that "overmic'd" sound with a harsher edge as most do speakers and phones do closer to their volume limit, and separation will be better when they're not struggling.

        One of my biggest pet peeves—at least on my phone—is that every time they connect after turning them on, they default to the same volume, which is WAY too loud for me and can actually hurt my ears and leave me with an hour or two of discomfort and slightly reduced hearing acuity. Make sure to turn them on, begin playing your media and double-check your volume levels before putting them on your head to avoid this. I take pride in my sensitive hearing and this is very important.

        It's also worth mentioning that the volume control on the headphones themselves is awkward since it requires holding a skip button. This means it's hard to make a delicate adjustment, since you have to hold it long enough to change at all, but not so long that it adjusts too far up or down. I recommend finding the setting that sounds the best, then adjusting on your device from that point forward.

        Overall, these are a no-brainer if you want $30 over-ear bluetooth headphones with solid, accurate-but-acceptably-compressed sound quality, great comfort, stellar battery life and a completely solid connection even from several yards away.
        Read more
        287 people found this helpful

      • Jayson A Olson
        4.0 out of 5 stars Fine for the price point, but uncomfortable over time.
        Reviewed in the United States on February 24, 2026
        Color: BlackVerified Purchase
        I'm wavering between 3 and 4 stars , but gave them the benefit based on proce point. Look, they are cheap headphones and get the job done as described.

        On the plus side, other than the cost, they were easy to pair with my devices. Buttons are at a minimum, and do what is expected of them. So far, battery life seems good, and it has the typical over the head adjustments and ear cup swivels. Not sure what to say about Noise Canceling....they appear to 'help' in that area and not saying they don't attempt to do noise cancelling, but are they excellent at NC?....well what to you think for $25?

        The biggest con in my opinion is wearing them for extended periods of time. I bought these for my work cubicle and tend to wear them for a few hours at a time here and there. After about 45minutes I started to notice a little ear fatigue, and what I meanby that is that after extended periods of time, the cups became more noticeable and uncomfortable around my ears and head. I need to take them off after a while and kind of massage the area before putting them back on again....probably the biggest drawback to me was them becomming uncomfortable after a period of time.

      • Alex
        5.0 out of 5 stars I love 'em!
        Reviewed in Canada on March 14, 2026
        Color: BlackVerified Purchase
        I love these headphones!

        I have purchased these headphones 3 times. I'm thinking of getting another pair. When I bought my first set, they were for my computer... for gaming and Discord (voice chat). I was tired of having wired headphones with that annoying cable running all over the place. Or worse, having to step away from the computer and forgetting you're wired to it and yanking the headphones off. I grabbed these because the price was right and honestly... I don't know what the difference between these and a $200 pair is. Read on to see why...

        The sound is good. Maybe not audiophile territory but I have no complaints. The Bass is bass-y... explosions sound awesome, car engines rumble nicely, I'm not going to get into all the sound effects, youll be reading all day, but suffice it to say... good sound.

        I bought a second pair for my phone and TV because I was so impressed with the quality of these headphones. That is how I found out they can connect to 2 devices at the same time! I'm not sure if that's common or not, but *I* was pleasantly surprised. When used for the TV, they definetely sound better than the TV speakers. For the phone they were good for phone calls, but where they excelled (for me) was when I listened to music. I have an eclectic taste in music but a few genres I listen to when I'm out and about are 80's, Techno, EDM, and some classic rock. These headphones managed to make it all sound great! Careful with the volume if you want to keep your hearing into your old age though, they can get LOUD.

        The third pair I bought was for a family member because I was so impressed with these. They use them for the PC and PS5.

        The best thing about these headphones, and the reason I'm looking into pair #4 is.... the battery life. OMG. I have used these things for over 12 hours straight... they were on and playing sound the entire time. Didn't need to charge them for the next day because, tbh, I forgot to plug them in... and they went for another 2 days before they reminded me to charge them. The second pair (for the TV / phone) I have charged, used for a couple hours, and left on the nightstand for DAYS before I used them again and they were fine. Didn't need to be charged. It's insane.

        I'm not sure when I bought the first pair, but it has to be around 2-3 years ago and they're still going strong. The faux leather covering on the speaker cuffs has long since worn away so that kinda sucks. Also, the depth of the cushion could be just a tad thicker beacuse, as time has gone by, the cushion has lost some cushion-y-ness and the ridge of my ear can make contact with the fabric covering the speaker. (I just bought pipe cleaers, twisted some together and then wrapped them around the inside of the cushion to "Red-Green" them. iykyk)

        I should note, that of the three I've purchased over the years, they are ALL still in use and working well.
        Read more

      Product Summary: KVIDIO Bluetooth Headphones Over Ear, 65 Hours Playtime Wireless Headphones with Microphone, Foldable Lightweight Headset with Deep Bass, HiFi Stereo Sound Low Latency for Travel Work Cellphone

      From KVIDIO

      4.5 out of 5 stars, 32,404 ratings

      Customer reviews

      10K+ bought in past month

      Price

      One-time purchase: THB 808.59

      Purchasing options

      Other sellers

      Other sellers

      About this Item

      • Stereo sound headphones: KVIDIO bluetooth headphones with dual 40mm drivers, offers an almost concert hall-like feel to your favorite music as close as you're watching it live. Provide low latency high-quality reproduction of sound for listeners, audiophiles, and home audio enthusiasts
      • Unmatched comfortable headphones: Over ear earmuff made by softest memory-protein foam gives you all day comfort. Adjustable headband and flexible earmuffs can easily fit any head shape without putting pressure on the ear. Foldable and ONLY 0.44lbs Lightweight design makes it the best choice for Travel, Workout and Every day use by College Students
      • Wide compatibility: Simply press multi-function button 2s and the over ear headphones with mic will be in ready to pair. KVIDIO wireless headsets are compatible with all devices that support Bluetooth or 3.5 mm plug cables. With the built-in microphone, you can easily make hands-free calls or facetime meetings while working at home
      • Seamless wireless connection: Bluetooth version V5.4 ensures an ultra fast and virtually unbreakable connection up to 33 feet (10 meters). Rechargeable 500mAh battery can be quick charged within 2.5 hours. After 65 hours of playtime, you can switch KVIDIO Cordless Headset from wireless to wired mode and enjoy your music NON-STOP. No worry for power shortage problem during long trip
      • Package: Package include a Foldable Deep Bass Headphone, 3.5mm backup audio cable, USB charging cable and User Manual.

      Product Description

      Why KVIDIO? SOUND: Dual 40mm Neodymium Drivers ensure you best audio performance. COMFORT: Memory-protein earmuff made by soft skin texture leather, by covering ear, over ear headphone will brings you best music enjoyment without hurt your listening. PORTABLE: Easy to carry with our foldable and lightweight design, perfect choice to long time travel and workout company. DURABLE and FLEXIBLE: KVIDIO headphone with adjustable headband and earcup, can fit heads, won't feel uncomfortable even after all day wearing. Package Content: 1 x Bluetooth Wireless Headphones 1 x 3.5mm Audio Cable 1 x USB Charging Cable 1 x User Manual Note: For first time of use, charge the headset in advance. The built-in microphone only functions in the wireless mode. The headphones are compatible with Bluetooth enabled TV or laptop. Or you need a separate Bluetooth adapter for those without built-in Bluetooth transmitter. Key Specifications Bluetooth Version: V5.4 Impedance: 32Ω±15% Driver (Full Range): 2 × 40 mm Frequency Response: 20 HZ-20 KHZ Sensitivity: 105dB±3dB Range: 10 m / 33 ft Playtime: 65 Hours Standby time: 500 Hours Charging time: 2.5 Hours (blue light up indicate fully charged) Use a 5.0V==1.0A (or higher than 1.0A) charger to charge KVIDIO 201 Suitable for: Compatible with smartphone, MP3, MP4, laptops, iPad, iPod, iPhone, Android, TV and many other Bluetooth-enabled devices. Note1: A wireless Transmitter (NOT Included) needs to be prepared when connected with a non-Wireless enabled TV/PC. Note2: USB C Cable is used only for charging, not wired mode.

      Newer Version Available

      KVIDIO Active Noise Cancelling Headphones, 70 Hours Playtime Bluetooth Headphones Wireless with Microphone, Transparency Mode, Deep Bass and Hi-Fi Stereo Sound Over Ear for Travel Office
